calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phil Foster of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, LLP telephone number 415-626-7744 for Plaintiff S & G Restaurant Management, LLC.
Nicholas Boos of Sedgwick LLP telephone number 415-781-7900 for Defendant Travelers Property Casualty Company of America.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO all three claims in the complaint is overruled. Plaintiff has sufficiently alleged that it is an insured and entitled to a defense of the underlying cases. While both requests for judicial notice are granted, the court cannot state on this pleading motion that as a matter of law that the judicially noticeable documents establish that plaintiff is not an insured. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phil Foster of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, LLP telephone number 415-626-7744 for Plaintiff S & G Restaurant Management, LLC.
Nicholas Boos of Sedgwick LLP telephone number 415-781-7900 for Defendant Travelers Property Casualty Company of America.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT AS TO the punitive damages allegations is denied. The complaint alleges sufficient facts to show that Travelers' denial of coverage was done maliciously and/or oppressively. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
